creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to crest from comment #4)
Sure.  But its more about the tedium of needing to be explicit to s6-rc everytime  that it is interacted with.  It is a lot more efficient making use of a 
LIVEDIR?= whatever
in the build, then to enter it "-l whatever" for every command.
